testcase.name: test_get_item_requires_tenant_match
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_qr_late_hours_isolation.py:38: in test_admin_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Test admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Test admin login failed: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
